questions.query: Which clean draft paper should be consulted for the broad allene-based chiral ligand framing?
questions.expected_reason: F3I is the designated overview/framing paper in the clean draft pack.

questions.query: Which paper is expected to support discussion of catalytic application details?
questions.expected_reason: F47A carries the method/application role in the clean draft data.

questions.query: Which selected paper has the strongest metadata warning and must be handled conservatively?
questions.expected_reason: P403 retains missing metadata/source-warning notes and is not trusted for scientific quality.

questions.query: Which papers should be cited when answering a comparison question across the whole clean draft pack?
questions.expected_reason: A cross-paper answer should retrieve all three clean draft records.

questions.query: Which records are safe for engineering RAG preflight but not final scientific claims?
questions.expected_reason: All records preserve needs_human_review=true and trusted_for_scientific_quality=false.

questions.query: Which retrieved item should warn the reviewer before using bibliographic details?
questions.expected_reason: P403 is intentionally kept as a cautionary metadata case.
